---
title: "RMT 2026 Summer School: Edge Statistics of Sparse Random Graphs"
date: 2026-06-28
categories: ["universality", "local laws", "random matrix theory", "configuration model"]
description: "Some of my takeaways from [Jiaoyang Huang](https://jiaoyang.github.io/)'s minicourse at the 2026 Random Matrix Theory summer school at the University of Michigan."
---
